title: cymbidium boreale
intro: Cymbidium boreale, also known as the Borneo cymbidium or the mountain cymbidium, is a species of orchid native to the mountains of Borneo. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cymbidium boreale include the potential treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
